description: Case diameter: 37 mmCase thickness: 7 mmDial shape: RoundFibre case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortBlack, embossed fibre strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleWhite dial with branding and brand logoQuartz movement of time display Screw to reset timeSolid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistance up to 50 meters, allowing you to use it during slight rains
